---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or platform integration
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the limitation you are facing.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Platform Details (if requesting new platform support)

- **Platform Name**: (e.g., Udemy, Khan Academy)
- **Platform URL**: (e.g., https://www.udemy.com)
- **How completion is shown**: Describe how the platform displays that an activity is completed (e.g., checkmark, popup, URL change)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
